chapter_title: Motor Transp. of Migrant Agricultural Workers
text:
(a) A carrier who violates this chapter commits an offense.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $5 or more than $50.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 647. Motor Transp. of Migrant Agricultural Workers
##### § 647.019 — Penalty

(a) A carrier who violates this chapter commits an offense.

(b) An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $5 or more than $50.

*Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 62, Sec. 17.34(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A carrier who violates this chapter commits an offense.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An offense under this section is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $5 or more than $50.
